#  Apache Flink ML 2.2.0 Release Announcement
April 19, 2023 - Dong Lin
The Apache Flink community is excited to announce the release of Flink ML 2.2.0! This release focuses on enriching Flink ML’s feature engineering algorithms. The librar…
